technology.title: Inside China’s robotics revolution
technology.summary: How close are we to the sci-fi vision of autonomous humanoid robots? I visited 11 companies in five Chinese cities to find out Chen Liang, the founder of Guchi Robotics, an automation company headquartered in Shanghai, is a tall, heavy-set man in his mid-40s with square-rimmed glasses. His everyday manner is calm and understated, but when he is in his element – up close with the technology he builds, or in business meetings discussing the imminent replacement of human workers by robots – he wears an exuberant smile that brings to mind an intern on his first day at his dream job. Guchi makes the machines that install wheels, dashboards and windows for many of the top Chinese car brands, including BYD and Nio. He took the name from the Chinese word guzhi , “steadfast intelligence”, though the fact that it sounded like an Italian luxury brand was not entirely unwelcome. For the better part of two decades, Chen has tried to solve what, to him, is an engineering problem: how to eliminate – or, in his view, liberate – as many workers in car factories as technologically possible. Late last year, I visited him at Guchi headquarters on the western outskirts of Shanghai. Next to the head office are several warehouses where Guchi’s engineers tinker with robots to fit the specifications of their customers. Chen, an engineer by training, founded Guchi in 2019 with the aim of tackling the hardest automation task in the car factory: “final assembly”, the last leg of production, when all the composite pieces – the dashboard, windows, wheels and seat cushions – come together. At present, his robots can mount wheels, dashboards and windows on to a car without any human intervention, but 80% of the final assembly, he estimates, has yet to be automated. That is what Chen has set his sights on. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國正快速推進機器人技術，特別是在汽車製造業。Guchi Robotics的創始人陳亮致力於自動化汽車的最終組裝，已經能夠無需人工安裝車輪、儀表板和窗戶，但仍有80%的組裝過程尚未自動化。
briefing.background: 中國的機器人產業在過去幾年中迅速發展，受到政府政策的強力支持。隨著製造業的升級需求，企業如Guchi Robotics正專注於解決汽車製造中的自動化挑戰。這一趨勢不僅反映了中國在全球科技競爭中的地位提升，也顯示出對於勞動力市場的潛在影響，尤其是在面對人口老齡化和工資上升的背景下。
briefing.analysis: Guchi Robotics的發展對於中國汽車製造商來說是一把雙刃劍。一方面，自動化可提高生產效率並降低成本，對企業利潤有直接促進作用；另一方面，這也可能導致大量工人失業，引發社會問題。政府可能會面臨如何平衡技術進步與就業保障的挑戰。國際市場上，若中國的自動化技術成熟，將可能改變全球汽車產業的競爭格局。

technology.title: Why OpenAI really shut down Sora
technology.summary: OpenAI's decision last week to shut down Sora, its AI video-generation tool, just six months after releasing it to the public raised immediate suspicions. The app had invited users to upload their own faces — so was this some kind of elaborate data grab?

briefing.news_focus: OpenAI's decision last week to shut down Sora, its AI video-generation tool, just six months after releasing it to the public raised immediate suspicions. The app had invited users to upload their own faces — so was this some kind of elaborate data grab?
briefing.news_focus_zh: OpenAI於上週關閉其AI視頻生成工具Sora，僅在公開發布六個月後，引發外界對其背後原因的懷疑，特別是用戶上傳面部數據的問題。
briefing.background: Sora作為OpenAI推出的視頻生成工具，旨在利用AI技術簡化視頻創作過程。然而，隨著用戶數據隱私問題日益受到關注，尤其是在數據使用和保護方面的法律規範逐漸嚴格，OpenAI的決策可能反映了對潛在法律風險的考量。此外，AI技術的快速發展也使得市場競爭加劇，企業需謹慎管理用戶數據以維持信任。
briefing.analysis: OpenAI關閉Sora的決定可能源於對用戶數據隱私的擔憂，尤其是在面對公眾質疑時。這一行動對OpenAI的品牌形象和用戶信任度有直接影響，可能導致用戶對未來產品的使用意願降低。另一方面，競爭對手可能會利用此事件來強調其在數據保護方面的優勢，進一步加劇市場競爭。未來，OpenAI可能需要重新評估其產品設計與數據管理策略，以避免類似情況再次發生。

supporting_titles: OpenAI closes Sora video-making app and cancels $1bn Disney deal

technology.title: Resident Evil at 30: how Capcom’s horror opus has survived and thrived
technology.summary: From owing a debt to obscure Japanese horror Sweet Home to the influence of Aliens and Texas Chain Saw Massacre, the franchise continues to petrify players three decades on To many of us playing and writing about video games in the 1990s, Resident Evil seemed to come out of nowhere. The emerging PlayStation and Saturn consoles were all about slick, bright arcade conversions – the shiny thrills of Daytona and Tekken – and Japanese publisher Capcom was in a rut of coin-op conversions and endless sequels to Street Fighter and Mega Man. Scary games were rare at the time and mostly confined to the PC. So when the news of a horror title named Biohazard (the Japanese name for the series) started to emerge in 1995, it caught the attention of games journalists as it seemed radically out of step with prevailing trends. Games were about power, but as early demos quickly revealed, Resident Evil was about vulnerability. Thirty years later, it’s still here. The series has sold more than 180m copies worldwide, with 11 core titles and dozens of spinoffs and remakes, as well as film, television and anime tie-ins. Its characters and monsters are icons, its tropes now embedded in game design practice. What has allowed it to not only survive but flourish in such a rapidly changing industry? Why do we still let it scare us? Continue reading...

Why do we still let it scare us? Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 《生化危機》系列自1996年推出以來，已經走過30年，成為遊戲界的經典。該系列不僅銷售超過1.8億部，還衍生出多部電影、電視劇和動畫，顯示其在快速變化的遊戲產業中持續蓬勃發展的能力。
briefing.background: 《生化危機》最初以其獨特的恐怖氛圍和遊戲機制在1990年代的遊戲市場中脫穎而出。當時，遊戲多以動作和競技為主，恐怖題材相對稀缺。隨著PlayStation的興起，Capcom成功將恐怖元素融入遊戲，開創了生存恐怖類型，並影響了後續的遊戲設計與文化。
briefing.analysis: 《生化危機》的成功在於其不斷創新與適應市場需求，從最初的恐怖生存遊戲演變為多元化的娛樂品牌。對於玩家來說，該系列提供了獨特的恐怖體驗，滿足了對挑戰與故事的需求。Capcom面臨的挑戰包括如何在保持品牌核心的同時，吸引新一代玩家。未來可能會出現更多跨媒體合作與新技術的應用，以維持其市場地位。

supporting_titles: How new fishing tech can reduce bycatch of turtles and other creatures

politics.title: Iran war, rogue drones force European aviation safety rethink
politics.summary: Wars, including a widening conflict in the Middle East, are heightening risks for aviation as flight corridors are squeezed and drones become more widespread, Europe’s top aviation safety regulator has said. The month-old Iran war is reshaping airspace across the Middle East and increasing disruption to flights, including clogging routes between Asia and Europe that previously transited or ‌flew over the region. On top of the prolonged Russia-Ukraine conflict and fighting between Pakistan and...

briefing.news_focus: Wars, including a widening conflict in the Middle East, are heightening risks for aviation as flight corridors are squeezed and drones become more widespread, Europe’s top aviation safety regulator has said. The month-old Iran war is reshaping airspace across the Middle East and increasing disruption to flights, including clogging routes between Asia and Europe that previously transited or ‌flew over the region. On top of the prolonged Russia-Ukraine conflict and fighting between Pakistan and...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著中東地區的伊朗戰爭擴大，歐洲航空安全監管機構指出，航空運輸面臨更高風險，航線受到擠壓，無人機的使用也日益普遍，迫使歐洲重新考慮航空安全措施。
briefing.background: 近年來，中東地區的衝突不斷升級，特別是伊朗戰爭的爆發，對航空運輸造成了重大影響。傳統的航線受到戰爭影響，導致航空公司必須重新規劃航線，增加飛行時間和成本。此外，無人機的使用頻率上升，進一步加劇了航空安全的挑戰。這一情況在俄烏衝突和巴基斯坦的戰鬥背景下顯得尤為複雜，對歐洲航空業的影響深遠。
stakeholders: 歐洲航空安全監管機構
briefing.analysis: 此事件對航空業的影響主要體現在安全與經濟兩方面。歐洲航空安全監管機構需要在保護乘客安全與維持航班效率之間找到平衡。航空公司可能面臨更高的運營成本，並需調整航班計劃以避開危險區域。各國政府也可能因應安全威脅而加強監管，這可能導致航班延誤和票價上漲。無人機的廣泛使用則可能引發更多的安全隱患，進一步複雜化航空安全的管理。

supporting_titles: Iran-Israel war highlights: U.N. force in southern Lebanon says peacekeeper killed
Did Israel miscalculate in launching the war on Iran?

politics.title: Why revived China-Philippine talks won’t lead to energy cooperation in the South China Sea
politics.summary: Maritime tensions between China and the Philippines are likely to persist despite Manila’s call for energy cooperation, Chinese observers said after revived diplomatic talks on the weekend. Senior diplomats from the two countries met in the Chinese city of Quanzhou on Friday and Saturday for two rounds of talks, covering a range of issues from oil and gas cooperation in the South China Sea to renewable energy and coastguard communication. The foreign ministry consultations were held for the...

The foreign ministry consultations were held for the...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國與菲律賓的外交談判雖然重啟，但專家指出，雙方在南海的海洋緊張關係仍將持續，並不會導致實質的能源合作。
briefing.background: 南海地區的能源資源豐富，但由於主權爭議，特別是中國與菲律賓之間的領土糾紛，能源合作一直受到阻礙。近期，兩國高層外交官在泉州舉行會談，討論包括油氣合作在內的多項議題，顯示出雙方希望改善關係的意願。然而，過去的經驗表明，外交談判常常無法轉化為實際的合作成果，尤其是在涉及主權的敏感問題上。
briefing.analysis: 中國與菲律賓在能源合作上的分歧主要源於對南海主權的不同認知。中國希望強化對該區域的控制，而菲律賓則尋求國際支持以維護其主權。儘管雙方表達了合作意願，但由於缺乏信任和明確的法律框架，實質進展難以實現。未來，若無法解決主權爭議，雙方的合作將面臨重重挑戰，可能導致局勢進一步緊張。

supporting_titles: Is the Philippines Really About to Restart Joint Oil Exploration With China in the South China Sea?
MAC on why songs may be banned in China
'Memory of a generation': China mourns the sudden death of a controversial education influencer

politics.title: Starmer to say Iran war means Labour’s values needed more than ever at local elections campaign launch – UK politics live
politics.summary: UK PM to chair meeting in Downing Street on how government responds to economic consequences of Iran war later on Monday As Jessica Elgot reports in her overnight story on the Labour local elections launch this morning, Keir Starmer will also highlight what Labour is doing to help people with the cost of living. In his news release issued ahead of the launch, Labour has highlighted more than a dozen measures coming into force within the next week that it says will help people with the cost of living. Here is the list. Key cost of living measures coming into force on 1 April: -Prescription charge freeze, keeping prescriptions under £10 Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國工黨領袖基爾·斯塔默在地方選舉活動啟動時強調，因伊朗戰爭帶來的經濟影響，使工黨的價值觀比以往更為重要。他指出工黨將推出多項措施以應對生活成本上升的挑戰。
briefing.background: 近期伊朗戰爭的爆發對全球經濟造成衝擊，特別是能源價格的上漲，進一步加劇了英國的生活成本危機。工黨在此背景下，試圖透過推出一系列政策來強化其在選民心中的形象，並展示其對民生問題的關注。地方選舉即將來臨，工黨希望藉此機會重新獲得選民支持，尤其是在經濟困境中。
briefing.analysis: 斯塔默的發言反映了工黨在當前政治環境中的策略調整，強調其對民生議題的重視，並試圖與執政保守黨形成鮮明對比。保守黨可能會面臨來自工黨的壓力，因為選民對生活成本的關注日益增加。工黨的措施若能有效緩解民生困境，將有助於提升其在即將到來的選舉中的競爭力，但若措施效果不彰，則可能進一步削弱其公信力。

supporting_titles: UK’s PM Starmer to host industry leaders for Middle East war talks on Monday
Did Israel miscalculate in launching the war on Iran?
One month of Israel-U.S. war on Iran: A timeline
How the Iran War Will Reconfigure Militancy in Balochistan

economy.title: UK savers told to act now before Easter Sunday cash Isa deadline
economy.summary: Interest rates as high as 4.45% and a steep cut in next year’s allowance fuel forecast of last-minute rush Cost of living: how to prepare for the ‘awful April’ shower of bill increases Savers who want to make the most of this year’s cash Isa allowance are being urged not to leave it to the last minute, as the deadline for applications falls on the Easter weekend. The Isa wrapper allows people to save or invest money and benefit from the returns free of tax. Each tax year, people can pay in up to £20,000, which can then be moved around in subsequent years without the tax benefits being lost. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Interest rates as high as 4.45% and a steep cut in next year’s allowance fuel forecast of last-minute rush Cost of living: how to prepare for the ‘awful April’ shower of bill increases Savers who want to make the most of this year’s cash Isa allowance are being urged not to leave it to the last minute, as the deadline for applications falls on the Easter weekend. The Isa wrapper allows people to save or invest money and benefit from the returns free of tax. Each tax year, people can pay in up to £20,000, which can then be moved around in subsequent years without the tax benefits being lost. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國儲戶被提醒在復活節前行動，以利用今年的現金ISA限額，因為利率高達4.45%，且明年限額將大幅削減。
briefing.background: 現金ISA（個人儲蓄帳戶）是英國政府為鼓勵儲蓄而設立的稅收優惠工具，允許個人每年存入最高20,000英鎊而不需繳稅。隨著利率上升，儲戶對於利用這一優惠的需求增加。2024年將面臨的限額削減，使得今年的儲蓄行為更為迫切，尤其是在生活成本上升的背景下，儲戶需謹慎規劃財務。
briefing.analysis: 這則新聞突顯了儲戶面臨的緊迫性，尤其是在生活成本上升的情況下，許多人可能會因為即將到來的開支而忽視儲蓄機會。銀行和金融機構將受益於儲戶的最後一刻申請，可能會加強市場競爭，進一步提高利率。此外，政府的限額調整可能會引發對未來儲蓄政策的討論，特別是在經濟不穩定的環境中，如何平衡稅收政策與促進儲蓄的需求將成為焦點。

economy.title: Cost of living: how to prepare for the ‘awful April’ shower of bill increases
economy.summary: From council tax to water, broadband to stamps, costs climb again from next month …. and that’s before any knock-on effects from Iran war UK savers told to act now before Easter Sunday cash Isa deadline Next month, UK households face a bill surge in which the annual cost of essentials, including council tax and water, increase by more than £200 – and that is before the full impact of price jumps caused by the Iran war hit your pocket. The “awful April” increases are particularly unwelcome as the financial turmoil caused by the Middle East conflict has pushed up mortgage rates, fuel prices and energy bills for rural households . Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: From council tax to water, broadband to stamps, costs climb again from next month …. and that’s before any knock-on effects from Iran war UK savers told to act now before Easter Sunday cash Isa deadline Next month, UK households face a bill surge in which the annual cost of essentials, including council tax and water, increase by more than £200 – and that is before the full impact of price jumps caused by the Iran war hit your pocket. The “awful April” increases are particularly unwelcome as the financial turmoil caused by the Middle East conflict has pushed up mortgage rates, fuel prices and energy bills for rural households . Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國家庭將在下月面臨生活成本上升，尤其是市政稅和水費等基本開支預計增加超過200英鎊，這一波漲價尚未考慮到伊朗戰爭帶來的後續影響。
briefing.background: 隨著全球經濟不穩定，英國的生活成本持續上升，特別是在能源和房貸利率方面。伊朗戰爭的爆發進一步加劇了市場的不確定性，導致燃料和能源價格上漲。這些因素共同影響了家庭的財務狀況，尤其是在即將到來的四月，預期的費用增加將對家庭預算造成壓力。
briefing.analysis: 此次生活成本上升對英國家庭來說是一個重大挑戰，尤其是低收入家庭將受到更大影響。政府面臨的壓力在於如何平衡經濟復甦與民生需求，可能需要考慮推出補貼或減稅措施以緩解民眾負擔。而金融機構則需應對因利率上升帶來的貸款風險，可能會影響其信貸政策。對於投資者而言，市場的不穩定性可能導致資本流動的變化，影響整體經濟增長。

supporting_titles: The hard right’s plans for Europe’s economy
How the Hormuz closure could affect food, medicines and smartphones
Rewriting Commerce For The Agentic Age

economy.title: E-commerce duties moratorium expires as WTO talks run out of time, officials say - Reuters
economy.summary: E-commerce duties moratorium expires as WTO talks run out of time, officials say Reuters

briefing.news_focus: E-commerce duties moratorium expires as WTO talks run out of time, officials say Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 世界貿易組織（WTO）關於電子商務關稅的暫停措施到期，因為相關談判未能達成共識，這可能對全球電子商務市場造成影響。
briefing.background: 自2019年以來，WTO成員國對電子商務關稅的暫停措施一直在進行討論。這項措施旨在促進數位貿易，避免對電子商務施加額外的稅負。然而，隨著談判的拖延，各國對於如何規範電子商務的立場出現分歧，導致暫停措施到期，可能影響未來的貿易政策和市場環境。
briefing.analysis: 各國在電子商務稅收政策上的立場差異明顯。發展中國家可能支持徵收關稅以保護本國產業，而發達國家則傾向於維持暫停以促進自由貿易。這一局面可能導致全球電子商務市場的不確定性，影響企業的投資決策及消費者的購物成本，未來可能需要重新啟動談判以達成共識。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體脈絡圍繞著全球科技進步與地緣政治的交互影響。中國在機器人技術上的快速發展，特別是在汽車製造業，顯示出科技對經濟結構的重塑潛力，而OpenAI關閉Sora的事件則反映出科技企業在數據隱私問題上的挑戰。與此同時，伊朗戰爭的擴大不僅影響了歐洲航空安全，也使得英國工黨在面對生活成本上升的背景下，強調其政策的重要性，顯示出政治與經濟之間的密切聯繫。
